characters.name: Andy Sipowicz
characters.description: Andy SipowiczBiographyFull NameAndrew Sipowicz Sr.AliasesDetectiveRelativesKatie Sipowicz(ex-wife)Sylvia Costas(2nd wife;deceased)Connie McDowell(current wife)Andy Sipowicz Jr.(son;deceased)Theo Sipowicz(son)Matthew Sipowicz(son)Michelle McDowell(stepdaughter)OccupationNYPD DetectiveAffiliationNYPDAppearancesFirstPilotLastMoving DayPortrayed byDennis Franz Andrew "Andy" Sipowicz Sr.was a police detective (later sergeant) of the NYPD 15th Precinct in the lower East Side of Manhattan. Sipowicz was the main character and the only regular cast member to appear in every episode of the series. Sipowicz is described as "a drunken, racist goon with a heart of gold." He is portrayed byDennis Franz. Before he was a police officer, Andy served in the Army for an 18-month tour in Vietnam. One of Andy's early police assignments was infiltrating the Black Panthers organization by posing as a white leftist radical. He worked in the Robbery Squad, but transferred to the 15th Precinct by the mid-80's. He received the Gold shield of "Detective Third Grade" in 1978.

Sipowicz was the main character and the only regular cast member to appear in every episode of the series. Sipowicz is described as "a drunken, racist goon with a heart of gold." He is portrayed byDennis Franz. Before he was a police officer, Andy served in the Army for an 18-month tour in Vietnam. One of Andy's early police assignments was infiltrating the Black Panthers organization by posing as a white leftist radical. He worked in the Robbery Squad, but transferred to the 15th Precinct by the mid-80's. He received the Gold shield of "Detective Third Grade" in 1978.

characters.name: Andy Sipowicz Jr.
characters.description: Andy Sipowicz Jr.Andy Sipowicz Jr.was the eldest son of DetectiveAndy Sipowiczwith his first wife Katie. The younger Andy originally hated his father due to the elder Andy being a drunken, abusive, non-parenting figure in his life, but began to respect his dad when he realized Andy Sr. was staying sober and was a great cop. Andy Jr. joined the Air Force, later getting an honorable discharge because of a torn rotator cuff, and then joined the Hackensack, New Jersey police department. His father taught him lessons about being a policeman until Andy Jr. was killed when he intervened in a robbery/rape, and one of the perpetrators shot him.  His death sent his father into a tailspin that nearly destroyed his life. After his death, Andy Jr. appeared on occasion in dreams and visions to talk with his dad, often contentiously but always with father and son saying they loved each other.

characters.name: Baldwin Jones
characters.description: Baldwin JonesBiographyFull NameBaldwin JonesStatusAliveGenderMaleRomancesValerie Haywood(ex-girlfriend)OccupationDetectiveAffiliationNew York Police DepartmentAppearancesSeasons6Episodes123FirstAlong Came JonesLastMoving DayPortrayed byHenry Simmons Baldwin Joneswas a detective in the 15th Precinct of the New York City Police Department who replaced forJames Martinez. He is portrayed byHenry Simmons. Jones's mother named him for the writer James Baldwin.  He had previously worked in the police department's bias crimes unit and transferred into the 15th Precinct to replace James Martinez. Jones and Greg Medavoy became close friends and solid partners, with Jones often using his calm and direct demeanor to hide his irritation and immediately refocus Medavoy when Medavoy talked too long about some inane subject or otherwise displayed his neurotic tendencies.

characters.name: Connie McDowell
characters.description: Connie McDowellBiographyStatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesMatt Sipowicz (son)Michelle Sipowicz (adopted daughter)RomancesAndy Sipowicz(husband)OccupationDetectiveAffiliationNew York Police DepartmentAppearancesSeasons4FirstOh, Golly GothLastColonel KnowledgePortrayed byCharlotte RossConnie McDowellis a former detective in the New York City Police Department. She is played byCharlotte Ross. McDowell was from upstate New York, where her father had been the chief of police for the city of Saratoga Springs. She began her detective career as a "floater" working temporary assignments in whichever precinct was shorthanded until receiving permanent assignment to the 15th Precinct. Soon after her arrival at the 15th Precinct, Lieutenant Arthur Fancy was promoted to captain, and McDowell did not hit it off with his intended replacement, Susan Dalto. Upon asking if it was too late for her transfer out of the 15th Precinct, Fancy counselled her to stay, so that she didn't develop a reputation as someone who couldn't get along with her superiors. Fancy ultimately solved the problem by engineering Dalto's transfer out; her replacement was Lieutenant Tony Rodriguez, with whom McDowell got along well. McDowell partnered first with Diane Russell, and later with Rita Ortiz.

characters.name: Danny Sorenson
characters.description: Danny SorensonBiographyFull NameDaniel SorensonStatusDeceasedGenderMaleRelativesLaurie Sorenson (sister)RomancesNadine DeMarco (ex-girlfriend)Mary Franco (ex-girlfriend)Kristen Moore† (girlfriend)OccupationNYPD DetectiveAffiliationNew York Police DepartmentAppearancesSeasons3Episodes59FirstDanny BoyLastUnder CoversPortrayed byRick Schroder Daniel"Danny"Sorensonis a fictional character in the television seriesNYPD Blue. He is a detective in the 15th Precinct of the New York City Police Department from 1999 to his death in 2001. He is portrayed byRick Schroder. Sorenson, a US Army Desert Storm veteran of approximately twenty-seven years of age, joined the 15th squad as the replacement for the deceased Bobby Simone. He was partnered with Detective Andy Sipowicz. In childhood Sorenson immigrated to the United States from Norway along with his younger sisters following the death of his father; They were raised by their aunt in Albany, New York, and he felt a lifelong sense of responsibility for their care.

characters.name: Janice Licalsi
characters.description: Janice LicalsiBiographyFull NameJanice LicalsiStatusAliveRomancesJohn Kelly(boyfriend)OccupationPolice Officer - promoted to DetectiveAffiliationNew York Police DepartmentAppearancesSeasons2Episodes24FirstPilotLastFor Whom the Skell RollsPortrayed byAmy BrennemanJanice LicalsiformerlyGennarois a former police officer who served in the New York City Police Department 15th Precinct. A uniformed police officer, Licalsi was assigned to the fictional 15th precinct. She took her mother's maiden name when she joined the force. Her father Dominic Gennaro, also a police officer, was on the payroll of mob boss Angelo Marino, who subsequently used this information to blackmail her into working for him. Janice pulling out her gun and killing Marino and the driver in episode4B or Not 4B

characters.name: John Irvin
characters.description: John IrvinBiographyStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationPolice administrative aideAffiliationNew York Police DepartmentResidenceNew York CityAppearancesSeasons10Episodes156FirstDirty SocksLastMoving DayPortrayed byBill Brochtrup John Irvinjoined the 15th Precinct as a temporary replacement forDonna Abandandoin 1995; he was friends withBobby Simonefrom their previous work at 1 Police Plaza, butAndy Sipowicz's homophobia initially led him to be rude to John. Over time, John and Andy became good friends, to the point of John babysitting for Andy's son Theo and Andy turning over his apartment to John when he moved in withConnie. When Sipowicz and McDowell got married, Irvin obtained minister's credentials from an online church so he could officiate. He was shot and nearly killed in Season 6 when trying to counsel Dolores Mayo's grieving father (the same incident in which Sylvia was killed). He had a poor relationship with his bigoted dad that only healed when they made peace not long before John's dad died. Irvin and his sister received sizable inheritances, but he continued to work. Irvin's knowledge of art, music, antiques, and fashion sometimes enabled him to make contributions that helped detectives solve cases, as did his knowledge of psychology and interpersonal relationships.

characters.name: John Kelly
characters.description: John KellyBiographyFull NameJohn Bradley Kelly, Jr.AliasesDetectiveStatusResigned(presumably alive)RelativesJohn Kelly, Sr.(father)Unnamed MotherRomancesLaura Michaels Kelly(ex-wife)Janice Licalsi(girlfriend)OccupationNYPD DetectiveAffiliationNYPDAppearancesSeasons2Episodes26FirstPilotLastDead and GonePortrayed byDavid Caruso DetectiveJohn Bradley Kelly Jr.was a police detective with the NYPD 15th Precinct. He was promoted to Detective when he was only 28 years old. His father, John Kelly Sr. was a heroic police officer who was killed in the line of duty. He is portrayed byDavid Caruso. John always managed to stay on the right side of the law and kept his partner,Andy Sipowiczunder control. In the 1st season, John met a uniform cop named Janice Licalsi. Janice murdered a mob boss named Angelo Marino, who was ordered to kill John. Janice murdered Marino to protect her father, who was also a police officer and was on Marino's payroll.
